com.github.romualdrousseau.any2json.v2.intelli

Class IntelliSheet

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.github.romualdrousseau.any2json.v2.base.AbstractSheet
      • com.github.romualdrousseau.any2json.v2.intelli.IntelliSheet
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Sheet, RowTranslatable
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    XlsSheet, XlsxSheet

    public abstract class IntelliSheet
extends AbstractSheet
implements RowTranslatable
